Skill Path: Civic Acumen

Your sharp vision enables you to gain information others can't perceive.

While developing your skills in Society you chose to focus specifically on Civic Acumen, learning basic techniques.You gain the following trained feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.yUuU9xyotrpwpTyC]{Read Lips}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.aAoFc10cOpxGypOY]{Sign Language}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.WeQGWvlWdeLeOlCN]{Glean Contents}.

This path focuses on @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.d9gbpiQjChYDYA2L]{Decipher Writing}.

Path Progression

  • Trained: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.yUuU9xyotrpwpTyC]{Read Lips}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.aAoFc10cOpxGypOY]{Sign Language}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.WeQGWvlWdeLeOlCN]{Glean Contents}
  • Expert: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.IyJyZ1VQxS58Nk6V]{Eyes of the City}
  • Master: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.WqTqHPDbargixuej]{Biographical Eye}
  • Legendary: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Zf4yiLDdxHPovEQI]{Legendary Codebreaker}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.n0S0tJiOJPQk0Rne]{Legendary Linguist}
